'''shangadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycology|mycology]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-ng-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycology|mycology]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shangadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shængædhæth|shængædhæth]] || [[word:shængædhæj|shængædhæj]] || [[word:shængædhæsh|shængædhæsh]] || [[word:shængædhæ|shængædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shangangadhath|shangangadhath]] || [[word:shangangadhaj|shangangadhaj]] || [[word:shangangadhash|shangangadhash]] || [[word:shangangadha|shangangadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shangadhath|shangadhath]] || [[word:shangadhaj|shangadhaj]] || [[word:shangadhash|shangadhash]] || [[word:shangadha|shangadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shangafdhafth|shangafdhafth]] || [[word:shangafdhafj|shangafdhafj]] || [[word:shangafdhafsh|shangafdhafsh]] || [[word:shangafdhaf|shangafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shangadhatha|shangadhatha]] || [[word:shangadhaja|shangadhaja]] || [[word:shangadhasha|shangadhasha]] || [[word:shangadhaka|shangadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shangadhath|shangadhath]] || [[word:shangadhaj|shangadhaj]] || [[word:shangadhash|shangadhash]] || [[word:shangadha|shangadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shangadhathal|shangadhathal]] || [[word:shangadhajal|shangadhajal]] || [[word:shangadhashal|shangadhashal]] || [[word:shangadhakal|shangadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shangadhaathatha|shangadhaathatha]] || [[word:shangadhaajaja|shangadhaajaja]] || [[word:shangadhaashasha|shangadhaashasha]] || [[word:shangadhaaka|shangadhaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shangadhathan|shangadhathan]] || [[word:shangadhajan|shangadhajan]] || [[word:shangadhashan|shangadhashan]] || [[word:shangadhakan|shangadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shangadhathaoro|shangadhathaoro]] || [[word:shangadhajaoro|shangadhajaoro]] || [[word:shangadhashaoro|shangadhashaoro]] || [[word:shangadhakaoro|shangadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|1e8b6ef}}
